task_completion.description: Set the vehicle parameter WPNAV_SPEED to 800
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGroundControl Vehicle Setup -> Parameters tab, the parameter 'WPNAV_SPEED' is searched and its value is set to 800.

task_completion.description: Create a mission with at least 4 navigation waypoints at 120 m altitude
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGroundControl Plan view, the mission item list shows at least 4 standard waypoints, and their altitude fields are set to 120.

task_completion.description: Set camera triggering to 25 meters after the first waypoint
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mission item list shows a 'Camera Trigger Distance' or 'DO_SET_CAM_TRIGG_DIST' command with a distance value of 25 inserted after the first waypoint.

task_completion.description: Disable camera triggering (distance 0) before the final waypoint
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mission item list shows a 'Camera Trigger Distance' or 'DO_SET_CAM_TRIGG_DIST' command with a distance value of 0 inserted just before the final navigation waypoint.

task_completion.description: Ensure the mission ends with an RTL command
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final item at the bottom of the mission list in the QGroundControl Plan view is 'Return To Launch' (RTL).
A 'File Save' dialog or QGC sync menu is visible showing the mission being saved as 'mapping_camera_mission.plan' in the /home/ga/Documents/QGC/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl GUI to create the mission and set parameters
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the QGroundControl application interface (Plan view, Parameters menu) rather than just terminal windows.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually write the .plan JSON file using a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The mission plan is built visually in QGC. There should be no screenshots of a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) being used to manually write the JSON structure of 'mapping_camera_mission.plan'.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI for parameter setting
integrity.visual_evidence: The WPNAV_SPEED parameter is modified within the QGC Parameters screen, not via terminal scripts or direct file modifications.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required QGC plan path is /home/ga/Documents/QGC/mapping_camera_mission.plan. The vehicle parameter WPNAV_SPEED must be set to exactly 800 (8 m/s). The mission must have a minimum of 4 waypoints at an altitude of 120 meters. Camera trigger distance must be set to 25 meters after the first waypoint and 0 meters before the final waypoint. The mission must end with an RTL command.
